title: Radiant WS2.1 landed
body: WS2.1 graph-ingest scaffold landed at 0f895070 with subject feat(graph-ingest): scaffold workspace (WS2.1). I first landed 42f2e721 to repair commit-msg/check-commit-message so commitlint uses the repo-pinned local dependency instead of unpinned pnpm dlx commitlint, which was resolving broken commitlint@21.0.1. WS2.1 commit hook passed staged prettier, staged markdownlint, shell lint, full turbo type-check/lint/test, prevent-accidental-major-version, and commitlint. Graph implementation and git/index claims are closed. Frictions F-29 to F-31 were recorded in .agent/plans/agent-tooling/frictions-register.md and remain intentionally outside the graph commit.
